strings.h

1
18#ifndef MEDIA_C_STRINGS_H_
19#define MEDIA_C_STRINGS_H_
20
21#include <stddef.h>
22#include <stdint.h>
23
24#include "list.h"
25
26#ifdef __cplusplus
27extern "C" {
28#endif
29
40typedef list_t strings_t;
41
47static inline strings_t* strings_new(size_t size) { return list_new(size, sizeof(char*)); }
48
54static inline void strings_free(strings_t* strings, void (*free_func)(void*)) {
55 if (strings != NULL) {
56 list_free(strings, free_func);
57 }
58}
59
66static inline bool strings_add(strings_t* strings, char* string) { return list_add(strings, &string); }
67
74static inline char* strings_get(const strings_t* strings, size_t index) { return *(char**)list_get(strings, index); }
75
81static inline size_t strings_size(const strings_t* strings) { return strings->size; }
82
88static inline size_t strings_capacity(const strings_t* strings) { return strings->capacity; }
89
95static inline bool strings_empty(const strings_t* strings) { return strings->size == 0U; }
96
97#ifdef __cplusplus
98}
99#endif
100
101#endif // MEDIA_C_STRINGS_H_
list.h
Generic dynamic array (list) container.
